content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the two source file changes: (1) success_reconciliation.rs adds run_id scoping to reconstruct_missing_pe_mappings so it only considers final-review aggregates from the current run, preventing resurrection of stale mappings from older runs or abandoned attempts; (2) template_catalog.rs adds planned-elsewhere classification instructions to the reviewer template. Both changes are narrow, correct, and well-documented. The starts_with(run_id) filter is safe given the fixed-format run_id (run-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS). All 1616 tests pass, no new clippy warnings. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
